design_decisions.format: JSON file (NOT module export — avoids self-checksum side-effect bug class from SD-LEO-INFRA-UNIFY-STAGE-DESIGN-001; NOT DB column — capabilities are code-bundled not data-mutable)
design_decisions.default_when_unknown: supports_cross_repo:true (safer default — if a sub-agent fails on cross-repo, the PLAN-TO-EXEC gate's CONDITIONAL_PASS surfaces it with diagnostic detail rather than silently skipping)
design_decisions.skip_reason_codes: sub_agent_engineer_only (DATABASE writes — needs ENGINEER_ROOT), sub_agent_ehg_only (would require an EHG-specific bundle/test runner)

VENTURE_STACK.notes: Deterministic venture-stack compliance checker (SD-LEO-INFRA-WIRE-PRE-BUILD-001). Reads the leaf SD's own text via the venture-stack-policy SSOT — no repo scan — so cross-repo is irrelevant (probe_path null).

DESIGN.notes: Original cross-repo fix landed via SD-LEO-INFRA-CROSS-REPO-AWARE-001 (PR #3971). Refactored to delegate to resolveSubAgentRepo by this SD.

SECURITY.notes: Scans for auth/RLS/credential patterns. Venture-specific scan is correct (each venture has its own security surface).

PERFORMANCE.notes: Bundle-size / load-time checks per-venture. May need venture-specific config (vite vs other bundlers) — surface via warnings, not blockers.

DEPENDENCY.notes: npm audit + outdated checks per-venture. CronGenius uses bun — npm CLI may behave differently; see SD-LEO-INFRA-VENTURE-TEST-RUNNER-001 (CAPA-5 follow-up).

API.notes: Was previously hardcoded to scan ehg/src/api and ehg/src/routes.

REGRESSION.notes: Module-scope DEFAULT_REPO_PATH at regression.js:34 was LOAD-BEARING eager-resolution at import. Refactored to lazy via resolveSubAgentRepo. Regression-pin test required before refactor.

QUICKFIX.notes: Default repo was 'ehg' (line 37); additional process.cwd() at line 76.

STORIES_CODEBASE.notes: Different shape from other sub-agents — PRD-input-driven, returns patterns (not verdict). Surfaces _resolution_metadata in returned patterns object; parent stories module folds into evidence row's metadata.repo_path. Was hardcoded path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../..') → getRepoRoot() (worktree-aware).

DATABASE_SCHEMA.notes: Validates schema changes which live in EHG_Engineer's database/migrations/. Venture-specific schema changes do not exist (ventures use the consolidated Supabase database).

DATABASE_MIGRATION.notes: Applies migrations via temp file in process.cwd()/.temp/. Must stay in EHG_Engineer (where migrations live).
